title: Red Sea transit risk premium spikes as vessel diversions accelerate
summary: Multiple carriers announce Cape of Good Hope diversions after renewed Houthi activity near Bab el-Mandeb. Asia–Europe container rates jump; Brent ticks higher on freight-adjusted landed cost.

markets.question: Will Red Sea shipping disruption persist through Q3?
Will Asia–Europe container freight rise >20% MoM?
Will Brent crude settle above $85/bbl this month?

news_headlines: Maersk extends Red Sea diversion through August
War-risk premiums on Bab el-Mandeb voyages hit 2024 highs
